```{r}
library(readr)
library(tidyverse)
library(here)
```

```{r}
annotation_table = read_tsv(here("figures/figure2_annotation_table.tsv"))
annotation_table$ID <- gsub("signature_","s",annotation_table$ID)
colnames(annotation_table)[ncol(annotation_table)] <- "signature_ID"
annotation_table <- annotation_table %>%
  mutate(dataset_ID = paste0("d", match(study_id, unique(study_id))))
annotation_table$dataset_ID[(nrow(annotation_table)-1):nrow(annotation_table)] <- NA
write_tsv(annotation_table, file=here("figures/annotation_table.tsv"))
```
